chunks.text: Cont’d Page 2... Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C. P. S–614 of 2025 Date Order with Signature of Judge D/O Matter 1. For order on CMA No.5551/2025 (Urgency) 2. For order on CMA No.5552/2025 (Ex. Appln) 3. For order on CMA No.5554/2025 (U/s 12 CPC r/w S.151 CPC) 4. For order on CMA No.5553/2025 (U/s 94 CPC r/w Order 39 R1&2 CPC 18.08.2025 Mr. Zuhaib Sarki, Advocate for the applicant. ------------------------------- 1. Urgency is granted. 2. Granted subject to all just exceptions. 3-4. The applicant, ASL Paper Mills Ltd. through their directors, Sajjad Ali Mehkari and Anwar Ahmed Khan (who is/are not arrayed as respondent-party in this petition) is/are aggrieved by the impugned Order dated 25.07.2025 passed by the Regular Bench of the High Court in writ jurisdiction allowing this Petition on its very first date of presentation without notice to and without hearing the Respondents, allegedly as contended by Applicant Counsel, by playing fraud on the Court and misleading the bench to passing Orders in a “Harrassment Petition” to set-aside, declare as illegal and void ab-initio certain Orders, namely: (i) Order dated 30.04.2024 (Annexure “J/1” on pages 97-101) and 08.07.2024 (Annexure “J/2” on pages 103-107) in Suo Moto Reference of Transfer Case No.46 and 47 of 2022, respectively, both such Orders passed by the Member (Gothabad), Board of Revenue, Sindh, who is impleaded in person as Respondent No.3; and (ii) Order dated 15.07.2025 (Annexure “K” on pages 109-119 ) in Suo Moto Case No.166/2021 passed by the Additional Commissioner-I, Karachi Division, who is impleaded in person as Respondent No.4

Granted subject to all just exceptions. 3-4. The applicant, ASL Paper Mills Ltd. through their directors, Sajjad Ali Mehkari and Anwar Ahmed Khan (who is/are not arrayed as respondent-party in this petition) is/are aggrieved by the impugned Order dated 25.07.2025 passed by the Regular Bench of the High Court in writ jurisdiction allowing this Petition on its very first date of presentation without notice to and without hearing the Respondents, allegedly as contended by Applicant Counsel, by playing fraud on the Court and misleading the bench to passing Orders in a “Harrassment Petition” to set-aside, declare as illegal and void ab-initio certain Orders, namely: (i) Order dated 30.04.2024 (Annexure “J/1” on pages 97-101) and 08.07.2024 (Annexure “J/2” on pages 103-107) in Suo Moto Reference of Transfer Case No.46 and 47 of 2022, respectively, both such Orders passed by the Member (Gothabad), Board of Revenue, Sindh, who is impleaded in person as Respondent No.3; and (ii) Order dated 15.07.2025 (Annexure “K” on pages 109-119 ) in Suo Moto Case No.166/2021 passed by the Additional Commissioner-I, Karachi Division, who is impleaded in person as Respondent No.4 - 2 - Additionally, Applicant Counsel submits that the Order dated 25.07.2025 seeking the cancellation of entries made in favour of the Petitioner and the Ghat Wadh Form No.22, directed to be restored forthwith had already been decided by the Revenue Hierarchy and overlaps subject property in High Court Suit No.1472 of 2022 (page 75), High Court Suit No.1093/2020 (on page 275 of Part-II of the file), and High Court Suit No.1353/2022 (on page 323 of Part-II of the file) which civils suits are pending trial and involve the applicants, petitioner and respondents. Applicant Counsel submits that, given the above submissions, the Applicant is an interested party and craves indulgence of this bench to issue notice of the application under Section 12 CPC, suspend the impugned Order dated 25.07.2025 and grant ad-interim relief in order to bring the proper and correct facts to the notice of the Court. Finally, he requests time to file an appropriate application to be impleaded in the array of respondents in this petition. Applicant Counsel’s submission merits consideration. Issue Notice to Petitioner and Respondents by all modes except publication, including electronic mode (by email and Whatsapp – Applicant Counsel to submit email address to Office). Meanwhile, until the next date of hearing, the Order dated 25.07.2025 is suspended and the Official Respondents are temporarily restrained from taking any action concerning the impugned Order and/or any other matter in relation thereto. Office to ensure compliance. To come up on 25.08.2025 at 11:00 a.m. J U D G E Asif
